notes: New: E-ink mode. Tap 📖 E-ink mode in the Captain's Console for a high-contrast black-on-white display tuned for grayscale e-readers like the Kindle Scribe — gradients, glows, shadows and animations are stripped, panels and buttons get crisp borders, and the selected tab / primary actions invert to solid black. Tap 🌙 Color mode to switch back; your choice is remembered and travels with your save.
